modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Projector screen not raising or lowering in smart classroom.

full_description_text:  
The user is trying to operate the projector screen in the smart classroom but is facing issues. The screen does not raise or lower when using the touch panel or the XPanel application. Additionally, pulling on the screen or the string does not help either. This has made it difficult for the user to utilize the projector effectively.
short_description: Projector screen not raising or lowering in smart classroom.
